mapper.insert:
insert into course_selection
student_id, course_id, semester_id, status
values
#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{semesterId},
#{status} '已选'
mapper.select: select cs.id, cs.course_id, cs.student_id as studentId, stu.name as student_name, c.course_name, c.credit, s.name as semester_name, cs.status, cs.score, cs.score_point, cs.create_time as createTime, cs.update_time as updateTime from course_selection cs left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join student stu on cs.student_id = stu.id left join semester s on cs.semester_id = s.id where cs.student_id = #{studentId} and cs.course_id = #{courseId} and cs.status = '已退课' limit 1

select cs.id, cs.course_id, cs.student_id as studentId, stu.name as student_name, c.course_name, c.credit, s.name as semester_name, cs.status, cs.score, cs.score_point, cs.create_time as createTime, cs.update_time as updateTime from course_selection cs left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join student stu on cs.student_id = stu.id left join semester s on cs.semester_id = s.id where cs.student_id = #{studentId} and cs.course_id = #{courseId} and cs.status = '候补' limit 1

select cs.id, cs.course_id, cs.student_id as studentId, stu.name as student_name, c.course_name, c.credit, s.name as semester_name, cs.semester_id as semesterId, cs.status, cs.score, cs.score_point, cs.create_time as createTime, cs.update_time as updateTime from course_selection cs left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join student stu on cs.student_id = stu.id left join semester s on cs.semester_id = s.id where cs.id = #{courseSelectionId}
